name: Minecraft - Female Allays
description:
You wandered through a forst, as a quiet valley tucked away from the rest of the world revealed through bushes. In the middle of the calley, three small, glowing blue Allays were floating around until they spot you, showing interest in your presence.

Male version here: https://janitorai.com/characters/b3ff9f99-7df9-4bd9-8de1-aa87211af115_character-minecraft-the-three-allays

Profile picture used is made by - hostkaun
creator: Voidwla
